name: Other Commercial and Service Industry Machinery Manufacturing
rationale: Highest incumbent vulnerability (8.60) because turbine and paddle-wheel sensors clog in detergent/lint environments and 20% of machines ship with no measurement at all; fragmentation bonus +2.0. Offset by the weakest fit score (3.78) due to cost-sensitive OEM segment and 4 mitigable constraints, including deferred NSF 61 certification.
entryStrategy: 1) Target commercial-laundry OEMs (Alliance, Electrolux Professional, Miele Professional) on supply-side warm-wash circuits. 2) Prove zero-clog MTBF over 12 months vs. paddle-wheel baseline. 3) Expand to car-wash OEMs (Istobal, WashTec). 4) Pursue NSF 61 cert. for ice/beverage wave 2. 5) Position as WaterSense/IoT differentiator.
